summary: Frontend-only UI redesign verified for HomeDashboard. PipelineSummaryWidget and UpcomingFollowupsWidget are now stacked as two consecutive full-width sections (no bento grid). All data-testids, responsive grids, urgency styling, navigation click-throughs, empty state, and urgent badge behavior work as expected.
verified_acceptance_criteria: HomeDashboard now stacks Pipeline (top) and Upcoming Follow-ups (below) as full-width sections; both measured at pipeWidth=1136 and fuWidth=1136 on a 1920px viewport; pipeTop(795) < fuTop(1185) confirming order.
PipelineSummaryWidget header renders 'My Pipeline' with pipeline-total (70 before seeding, 73 with 3 TEST_* seeded leads) and 'TOTAL LEADS' label + 'View all' link navigating to /leads (verified).
pipeline-bar renders with 7 non-zero segments, each click navigates to /leads?status={status} (verified for first segment -> /leads?status=new).
pipeline-tiles container uses grid classes: 'grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6' (responsive verified on mobile 390px -> grid-cols-2 and desktop 1920px -> lg:grid-cols-6).

11 pipeline-tile-{status} elements rendered (new, qualified, contacted, proposal_internal_review, ready_to_share_proposal, proposal_shared_with_customer, trial_in_progress, won, lost, not_qualified, proposal_approved_by_customer). Each shows count, % of total, mini progress bar, and uppercase label.
Color palette: 'new' tile blue, 'qualified' emerald, 'won' green, 'lost' red — visually confirmed in screenshot.
With 3 seeded leads (today/tomorrow/later): followups-grid rendered 3 cards; followups-urgent-badge displayed '1 urgent' (only today counts, matching overdue+today logic).

Each followup-card-{id} shows: type chip (LEAD), due-date pill (Today rose-bold, Tomorrow amber, Fri May 8 slate), bold title, contact name with User icon. data-urgency attribute correctly set to 'today', 'tomorrow', 'later'.
Empty state (followups-empty) shown when upcomingLeads is empty (verified prior to seeding).
Calendar widget (Week Ahead) still renders and is unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineSummaryWidget.js and UpcomingFollowupsWidget.js are small, focused components; no DRY/async/size concerns.

Minor: Show more logic triggers only when items.length > 8 — backend currently caps upcoming_leads at 10 combined, so show-more visibility can only occur with 9-10 items; not a bug, just noting the small range.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily inserted 3 TEST_Followup leads (today/tomorrow/+3 days) assigned to the CEO user to exercise urgency styling and urgent badge; all seed docs cleaned up (delete_many on company regex ^TEST_Followup returned 3).
context_for_next_testing_agent: HomeDashboard pipeline+followups redesign fully validated on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Seed data cleanup already done. If re-running urgency tests, insert leads into test_database.leads with tenant_id=nyla-air-water, assigned_to='7d03cff4-4db2-4b2e-969b-f5b3d57d58a6', and field 'next_followup_date' (YYYY-MM-DD).
